lessons.title: The Linux Software Ecosystem: Repos & Packages
lessons.description: Understand where software comes from, what a package is, and why repositories matter for security.

lessons.title: Installing Tools: apt-get and apt
lessons.description: Master the essential commands to find and install hacking tools from trusted sources.

lessons.title: Updating and Removing Software
lessons.description: Keep your system patched and clean. Learn to upgrade, remove orphaned packages, and manage dependencies.

lessons.title: Controlling Services with systemctl
lessons.description: Start, stop, and check the status of background services. The hacker's guide to managing daemons.

lessons.title: Enabling and Masking Services for Stealth
lessons.description: Make services start at boot, or disable them permanently to reduce attack surface and stay hidden.
